Fun stuff. Today shall be long. Send all the uplifting things. Same name on discord.
item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Atoms
item.description:
Everyone: Please give your furbabies pets for me. ❤️
Cat tax: Bean enjoying a sunbeam. A SunBean, if you will. . . . FRONT PAGE EDIT: Although I knew full well I'd get the pedantic "ACKCHYUALLY" type comments because it's the internet, it still saddens me. So for those of you who can appreciate the poetry and the beauty of the words in these images - thank you. ❤️ Please keep being your whimsical self, and continue finding beauty where others see none. And those of you who insist upon pedantry, I implore you to put down your phone, go outside, and put your toes in the sunshine for a bit.
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: just because
item.dc:creator: theyallwenttoMexico

item.title: Embarrassed Yor Forger - Spy x Family Cosplay
item.description:
I adore Yor so much! This was so fun being this side of her personality. I love getting into the characters I am portraying. Hope you all dig this one, and check out the series if you get a chance, I talk about it extensively in an upcoming video lol Also, for a look inside my cosplay theory and implementation, check out my latest YouTube discussing the Worst DC Comics cosplay adaptations of all time: https://youtu.be/x2at8HR2Akk
The inspiration :D I love every scene with Yor losing it over Loid
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.description: Hade me fooled for a few seconds…. Thought this was neat and wanted to share. Have a great day on Imgur & Love from Japan!

item.title: The 514th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 4
item.description:
Lots Of Lesbiabs
I'm also a Subaru owner, does that make me a lesbian?
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk.
There's a town in Minnesota called "Gaylord"
Wow. super hard to read. Sorry.
W U T
David Tennant. A Glorious Man.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: What Happened Today #125
item.description: Elon Musk called Trump's signature bill a "disgusting abomination" on Tuesday. By Wednesday, the White House had unleashed travel bans, Harvard sanctions, Putin threats, Biden investigations, mass firings, and a dozen other crises to bury the story. The classic authoritarian playbook: overwhelm everyone with noise until they forget what they were originally angry about. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-restricts-travel 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-bars-foreign-harvard-students 3. https://go.govbrief.today/russia-retaliate-spiderweb 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-bill-trillions 5. https://go.govbrief.today/tariffs-shrink-economy 6. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-delays-farm-report 7. https://go.govbrief.today/cpi-data-quality 8. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-debt-limit 9. https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-official-resigns 10. https://go.govbrief.today/army-defends-parade 11. https://go.govbrief.today/us-vetoes-un-ceasefire 12. https://go.govbrief.today/inexperienced-terrorism-prevention 13. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-courthouse-arrests 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-investigates-biden 15. https://go.govbrief.today/hoax-biden-call-trial 16. https://go.govbrief.today/guatemalan-man-returned 17. https://go.govbrief.today/venezuelans-due-process-ordered 18. https://go.govbrief.today/attackers-family-ordered-held 19. https://go.govbrief.today/ks-detention-center 20. https://go.govbrief.today/ed-dept-order-blocked 21. https://go.govbrief.today/hhs-data-errors 22. https://go.govbrief.today/pa-sues-usda 23. https://go.govbrief.today/voa-cut-1000 Yesterday's Story - https://go.govbrief.today/musk-disgusting-abomination Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/sajet-still-working Subscribe Free & Private: https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: I for one, am excited.
item.description: We were originally a little worried because weren't sure how tight finances would be and whether or not we'd have to portion meals, but we've already discovered some cheap and sustainable options that are quickly becoming staples. Like, refried beans for bean burritos are ridiculously easy to make and infinitely more flavorful than the stuff from the can. Same with Spanish rice. This weekend we're gonna do a lot of meal prepping burritos and then in a couple weeks, I'm going to make a super big batch of tamales. I think the only thing I really miss from before the budgeting, is the sparkling water.
item.dc:creator: HarelessMoon

item.title: It is time to meme
item.description:
Just bros training for a ranking match of jerkmates
Yeah there's a bit of everything as always. Enjoy the randomness
5
10
15
20
This meme might be my favorite of this selection
25
30
That's it for today ! Have a good day ! And Week ! After that we'll see. Checkout my profile for other memes, or wait a week or so for more chaos
